commands.author: ShadowWalker2014
commands.command: iteration 2 addressed in commit `22e07c08fd`: **[p2] in-flight bullet sends вЖТ orphan preview race** you're right вАФ `deletebulletpreview()` was capturing ids and calling `forcenewmessage()` without draining the draft loop's in-flight send. `workingвА¶` sends in flight when the helper ran could complete after we'd reset, leaving an orphan preview. fix: `deletebulletpreview()` now awaits `draftstream.flush()` first. `flush()` drains pending text and waits for in-flight sends to settle, so when `channelid`/`messageid` are read next they point to the real slack message. `forcenewmessage` + `chat.delete` then completes the deletion. `clear()` is still off-limits because it calls `discardpending` вЖТ `stop`, but `flush` keeps the loop reusable. **[p3] changelog entry** added under `unreleased` / `fixes` (`channels/slack: вА¶`). single-line, no maintainer attribution. **drive-by** `scripts/check-no-raw-channel-fetch.mjs` allowlist had stale line numbers for `extensions/chutes/models.ts` and `extensions/huggingface/models.ts` (off-by-one) after upstream's `52cd76a9e2` (`fix(providers): isolate model discovery test env guards`) shifted those files by an added import. updated `(535, 542, 142)` вЖТ `(536, 543, 143)` so `check-additional-boundaries` passes. happy to split this off into its own pr if preferred вАФ flagging here so it's visible. **test status** 89 files / 897 tests pass. `pnpm run lint:tmp:no-raw-channel-fetch` passes. `oxfmt --check` clean. pushed; ci re-running.
commands.freeform_prompt: iteration 2 addressed in commit `22e07c08fd`: **[P2] In-flight bullet sends вЖТ orphan preview race** You're right вАФ `deleteBulletPreview()` was capturing IDs and calling `forceNewMessage()` without draining the draft loop's in-flight send. `WorkingвА¶` sends in flight when the helper ran could complete after we'd reset, leaving an orphan preview. Fix: `deleteBulletPreview()` now awaits `draftStream.flush()` FIRST. `flush()` drains pending text and waits for in-flight sends to settle, so when `channelId`/`messageId` are read next they point to the real Slack message. `forceNewMessage` + `chat.delete` then completes the deletion. `clear()` is still off-limits because it calls `discardPending` вЖТ `stop`, but `flush` keeps the loop reusable. **[P3] CHANGELOG entry** Added under `Unreleased` / `Fixes` (`Channels/Slack: вА¶`). Single-line, no maintainer attribution. **Drive-by** `scripts/check-no-raw-channel-fetch.mjs` allowlist had stale line numbers for `extensions/chutes/models.ts` and `extensions/huggingface/models.ts` (off-by-one) after upstream's `52cd76a9e2` (`fix(providers): isolate model discovery test env guards`) shifted those files by an added import. Updated `(535, 542, 142)` вЖТ `(536, 543, 143)` so `check-additional-boundaries` passes. Happy to split this off into its own PR if preferred вАФ flagging here so it's visible. **Test status** 89 files / 897 tests pass. `pnpm run lint:tmp:no-raw-channel-fetch` passes. `oxfmt --check` clean. Pushed; CI re-running.
